message:
test(wa-core): Add WezTerm CLI JSON parsing test fixtures

Implements comprehensive integration tests for WezTerm CLI output parsing,
ensuring PaneInfo models correctly deserialize all variations of the
`wezterm cli list` JSON output format.

Test Suite (wezterm_fixtures.rs - 169 LOC):
- parse_local_single_pane: Standard local pane with full metadata
- parse_multi_pane_split: Two panes in same tab (split scenario)
- parse_ssh_multiplexed: Mixed local + SSH remote panes
- parse_minimal_fields: Graceful handling of missing optional fields
- parse_future_compat: Unknown fields captured in extra map
- inferred_domain_from_cwd: Domain inference from file:// URLs
- all_fixtures_parse_successfully: Meta-test for fixture validity

Fixture Files (tests/fixtures/wezterm_cli/):

local_single_pane.json (508B):
- Single local pane with all fields populated
- Validates: pane_id, domain_name, title, cwd, size with pixels/DPI
- Tests file:// URL parsing for local paths
- Covers: is_active, is_zoomed, cursor position, tty_name

multi_pane_split.json (577B):
- Two panes in same tab demonstrating split layout
- Tests tab_id correlation across panes
- Validates only one pane is_active at a time

ssh_multiplexed.json (987B):
- Three panes: one local, two SSH remotes (prod-server, staging-server)
- Tests domain_name parsing: "local" vs "ssh:hostname"
- Validates file://hostname/path URL parsing for remote cwds
- Tests parsed_cwd().is_remote and parsed_cwd().host extraction
- Critical for swarm management across multiple hosts

minimal_fields.json (66B):
- Only required fields: pane_id, tab_id, window_id
- Tests default value fallbacks:
  * effective_domain() → "local"
  * effective_title() → ""
  * effective_rows() → 24
  * effective_cols() → 80
- Ensures resilience to sparse CLI output

future_compat.json (263B):
- Contains hypothetical future fields:
  * some_new_field_v2: "future value"
  * another_field_v3: { nested: true, version: 3 }
  * numeric_future_field: 42
- Tests #[serde(flatten)] extra: HashMap<String, Value>
- Validates unknown fields are captured, not rejected
- Critical for forward compatibility with WezTerm updates

Design Rationale:
- Fixtures represent real WezTerm CLI output variations
- Tests run without WezTerm installed (pure JSON parsing)
- Forward compatibility pattern prevents breakage on WezTerm updates
- Each test validates specific parsing edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,50 @@
+[
+  {
+    "pane_id": 0,
+    "tab_id": 0,
+    "window_id": 0,
+    "domain_name": "local",
+    "workspace": "default",
+    "size": {
+      "rows": 24,
+      "cols": 80
+    },
+    "title": "local shell",
+    "cwd": "file:///home/user",
+    "is_active": false,
+    "is_zoomed": false
+  },
+  {
+    "pane_id": 1,
+    "tab_id": 1,
+    "window_id": 0,
+    "domain_id": 1,
+    "domain_name": "ssh:prod-server",
+    "workspace": "default",
+    "size": {
+      "rows": 48,
+      "cols": 120
+    },
+    "title": "prod-server: /var/log",
+    "cwd": "file://prod-server/var/log",
+    "is_active": true,
+    "is_zoomed": false,
+    "tty_name": "/dev/pts/1"
+  },
+  {
+    "pane_id": 2,
+    "tab_id": 2,
+    "window_id": 0,
+    "domain_id": 2,
+    "domain_name": "ssh:staging-server",
+    "workspace": "default",
+    "size": {
+      "rows": 48,
+      "cols": 120
+    },
+    "title": "staging-server: ~",
+    "cwd": "file://staging-server/home/deploy",
+    "is_active": false,
+    "is_zoomed": false
+  }
+]
